title: Try, Try Again
lesson: If you fall down, you can get back up and try again.
prompts: On a sunny park path — green grass, leafy trees, warm sunlight — the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image is sitting on a little red balance bike with both feet on the ground, wearing a snug safety helmet, with an excited smile. {GENDER_M_AGE_35_RACE_ASIAN_PARENT} stands nearby, one hand resting gently on the bike, smiling encouragingly. Eye-level medium shot, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

On a sunny park path — green grass, leafy trees, warm sunlight — the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image is wobbling on the little red balance bike, wearing the safety helmet, leaning slightly to one side with a surprised expression. {GENDER_M_AGE_35_RACE_ASIAN_PARENT} stands nearby, reaching out a hand, looking watchful and ready to help. Eye-level three-quarter shot, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

On a sunny park path — green grass, leafy trees, warm sunlight — after a gentle tumble, the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image is sitting safely on the green grass beside the little red balance bike, still wearing the safety helmet, with a tiny pout but no tears. {GENDER_M_AGE_35_RACE_ASIAN_PARENT} kneels nearby, leaning in kindly and offering an open hand. Eye-level medium shot, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

On a sunny park path — green grass, leafy trees, warm sunlight — the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image is standing back up next to the little red balance bike, wearing the safety helmet, brushing off the grass with a determined little smile. {GENDER_M_AGE_35_RACE_ASIAN_PARENT} crouches nearby, clapping and cheering them on warmly. Eye-level medium shot, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

On a sunny park path — green grass, leafy trees, warm sunlight — the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image is riding the little red balance bike a short way, wearing the safety helmet, beaming with delight, both feet gliding just above the ground. {GENDER_M_AGE_35_RACE_ASIAN_PARENT} stands in the background, cheering with both arms raised. Eye-level three-quarter shot, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

On a sunny park path — green grass, leafy trees, golden afternoon light — the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image is standing proudly beside the little red balance bike, one hand resting on the handlebar, wearing the safety helmet, with a big happy smile. {GENDER_M_AGE_35_RACE_ASIAN_PARENT} kneels nearby, cheering and giving a thumbs-up with a proud, delighted expression. Eye-level medium shot, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.
gists: On a sunny park path, the child sits on a little red balance bike wearing a helmet with feet down, excited, while the father rests a hand on the bike encouragingly — ready to ride.
On the park path, the child wobbles on the red balance bike, leaning to one side with a surprised look, while the father reaches out, ready to help.
On the park path after a gentle tumble, the child sits safely on the grass beside the red bike with a small pout but no tears, while the father kneels offering an open hand.
On the park path, the child stands back up beside the red bike, brushing off grass with a determined smile, while the father crouches clapping and cheering — trying again.
On the park path, the child rides the red balance bike a short way, beaming, while the father further back cheers with arms raised — the child succeeds.
On the park path in golden light, the child stands proudly by the red bike with a big grin while the father kneels giving a proud thumbs-up — never gave up.
texts: You sat on your little red bike, helmet on tight. "I'm going to ride!" you said. Dad smiled beside you.
You pushed off — but wibble, wobble! The bike tipped to one side. "Whoa!" you cried.
Down you went onto the soft green grass. It didn't hurt, but you felt a little sad.
Dad held out his hand. "You can try again," he said kindly. You stood up and brushed off the grass.
You pushed off once more and — you were riding! "Look at me go!" you laughed. Dad cheered with his arms up high.
You stood proudly by your bike with a great big grin. "You did it!" said Dad. You never gave up.
